pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 17 to Java 21 to enable compilation for the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles for Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or potentially causing incompatibility if the build environment enforces JDK 21 strictness.

pom.xml.general_idea: Adopt Spring Boot 3.4.11 as the parent POM to manage dependency versions and build configuration for the Java 21 migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and provides managed dependencies compatible with modern JDKs; migrating to it ensures alignment with the target ecosystem.

src/main/java/com/examples/commons/JSON..general_idea: Remove deprecated Jackson 2.18+ configuration features from JsonMapper builder.
src/main/java/com/examples/commons/JSON..why_exists: MapperFeature.REQUIRE_SETTERS_FOR_GETTERS, DeserializationFeature.FAIL_ON_UNKNOWN_PROPERTIES, and SerializationFeature.FAIL_ON_EMPTY_BEANS are deprecated or removed in newer Jackson versions, causing compile errors or warnings treated as errors.
